response:
# Leapsome vs 15Five: Pricing & Features Comparison

## Pricing Overview

| **Aspect** | **Leapsome** | **15Five** |
|---|---|---|
| **Starting Price** | ~$4-5/user/month | ~$10/user/month |
| **Billing** | Monthly or Annual | Monthly or Annual |
| **Free Trial** | Yes (14 days) | Yes (varies) |
| **Best For** | Budget-conscious teams | Enterprise-focused needs |

## Core Features

### Leapsome
✅ **Strengths:**
- Performance management & feedback
- Learning & development tools
- Employee engagement surveys
- Lightweight, easy setup
- Lower cost of entry
- Customizable workflows
- Mobile app included

❌ **Limitations:**
- Fewer advanced analytics
- Smaller ecosystem
- Less enterprise-grade customization

### 15Five
✅ **Strengths:**
- Advanced OKR management
- Deeper analytics & insights
- Better enterprise integration
- Robust employee engagement
- Pulse surveys & sentiment tracking
- Slack integration (native)
- Stronger scalability

❌ **Limitations:**
- Higher price point
- Steeper learning curve
- May be overkill for small teams

## Feature Comparison Table

| **Feature** | **Leapsome** | **15Five** |
|---|---|---|
| 1-on-1 Meetings | ✅ | ✅ |
| Goal/OKR Tracking | ✅ | ✅✅ (Advanced) |
| Performance Reviews | ✅ | ✅ |
| Learning Management | ✅ | Limited |
| Surveys/Pulse Checks | ✅ | ✅✅ |
| Analytics & Reporting | ✅ | ✅✅ |
| Enterprise SSO | Limited | ✅ |
| API Access | Basic | Advanced |

## Bottom Line

**Choose Leapsome if you:**
- Have a smaller budget
- Want simplicity + functionality
- Need learning management
- Value ease of implementation

**Choose 15Five if you:**
- Run an enterprise organization
- Need advanced OKR/goal tracking
- Require robust analytics
- Integrate heavily with other tools

Would you like me to dive deeper into any specific feature?
